mapper.select:
SELECT d.*, c.name AS categoryName FROM dish AS d LEFT JOIN category AS c ON d.category_id = c.id
AND d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND d.category_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{categoryId}, '%')
AND d.status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{status}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.category_id, d.price, d.image, d.description, d.status, d.update_time, c.name as category_name, df.id as dish_flavor_id, df.dish_id, df.name as dish_flavor_name, df.value FROM dish AS d JOIN category AS c ON d.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN dish_flavor df ON d.id = df.dish_id WHERE d.category_id = #{categoryId} AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.update_time DESC

SELECT d.id, d.name, d.category_id, d.price, d.image, d.description, d.status, d.update_time, c.name as category_name FROM dish AS d JOIN category AS c ON d.category_id = c.id WHERE d.category_id = #{categoryId} AND d.status = 1 ORDER BY d.update_time DESC
